posts.author: dominikh (dominik)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,
I’m making automatons in Make.com.
I think publishing my notes can be useful.

What I’m planing to achieve:
create table from Google sheet with table and fields names

And a next one:
a make.com scenario searching a column in Monday for specified value and replacing it with another value.

Sample screen below.
I think the only think not obvious is TableName.
This is the number form url in Monday of the table that is going to by used in scenario.

Screenshot 2025-03-28 at 19-16-25 fields create from scenario imputs Make1365×1303 104 KB
